company.name: Highline Luxurious Stay
company.tagline: Relax yourself at the most comfortable Highline Luxurious Stay cottages in Kodaikanal with stunning mountain views.
company.description: Welcome to Highline Luxurious Stay - your ultimate destination for luxury cottage retreats in the serene hills of Kodaikanal. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, nature, and hospitality.

mission: To provide guests with an exceptional stay that reconnects them with nature while offering modern comfort and world-class hospitality.
vision: To be the most preferred luxury cottage destination in Kodaikanal, known for sustainable practices and authentic guest experiences.
about: What makes Highline Luxurious Stay's Kodai cottages special? Our cottages are strategically positioned to provide the best natural comfort and breathtaking views. Every detail from location to construction has been planned to complement the natural environment. We maintain a balance between luxury and sustainability, ensuring our guests enjoy nature responsibly.

contact.distanceFromCity: 20 mins from city center by cab or private vehicle
